purpose: Machine-readable generated/open gate matrix comparing candidate engineering/physics routes against FM1 constraints plus transport/readout separation from Phase 3 mining.
non_promotion_rule: This matrix ranks design leads only. It is not source-extracted evidence, engineering feasibility, substrate selection, IP, or investor-readiness. All routes remain blocked pending external source review and route-specific checks.

gates.gate_description: Must provide native degrees of freedom, not merely externally imposed computational encoding.
Must provide native allowed configurations/local transformations.
Readout must be intrinsic boundary/canonical/observable structure, not only a user output register.
Must declare whether readout is faithful, non-faithful, or unknown relative to internal/bulk realization.
Must have native settling, scattering, variational, relaxation, or formation dynamics producing readout-bearing states.
Must plausibly connect to labs, instrumentation, staged demos, or partnerships.
Must have kill conditions and testable negatives.
Must distinguish transport/coupling/routing from canonical readout semantics.
Must declare whether relevant constraints/equality layers are intrinsic to the route, imposed by tuning/saturation/degeneration, absent, or unknown.

matrix.gate_description: Must provide native degrees of freedom, not merely externally imposed computational encoding.
evidence_needed: source review for native state-space / carrier semantics
rule out merely user-imposed encoding

matrix.gate_description: Must provide native allowed configurations/local transformations.
evidence_needed: source review for native local operations
identify admissibility law or local constraints

matrix.gate_description: Readout must be intrinsic boundary/canonical/observable structure, not only a user output register.
evidence_needed: source review for boundary/readout observables
show readout is intrinsic not output-register convention

matrix.gate_description: Must declare whether readout is faithful, non-faithful, or unknown relative to internal/bulk realization.
evidence_needed: declare readout map and bulk equivalence relation
look for same-readout/different-bulk or faithful reconstruction evidence

matrix.gate_description: Must have native settling, scattering, variational, relaxation, or formation dynamics producing readout-bearing states.
evidence_needed: identify native dynamics or process
avoid importing positive-geometry target as dynamics

matrix.gate_description: Must plausibly connect to labs, instrumentation, staged demos, or partnerships.
evidence_needed: identify labs/instrumentation/prototype path
rank staged demo feasibility

matrix.gate_description: Must have kill conditions and testable negatives.
evidence_needed: write route-specific kill conditions
define negative controls

matrix.gate_description: Must distinguish transport/coupling/routing from canonical readout semantics.
evidence_needed: separate transport/coupling from canonical readout
show transport preserves/exposes readout rather than externally routing signals

matrix.gate_description: Must declare whether relevant constraints/equality layers are intrinsic to the route, imposed by tuning/saturation/degeneration, absent, or unknown.
evidence_needed: declare equality_layer_status as ABSENT, GENERIC_INEQUALITY, DEGENERATIVE_EQUALITY, INTRINSIC_EQUALITY, or UNKNOWN
identify whether constraints are native to the regime or imposed by external tuning/saturation/degeneration
provide source or experiment before assigning non-UNKNOWN status to physical routes

next_actions.action: Create external source-intake plan for Route A topoelectrical + superconducting microwave hybrid.
Define route-specific kill conditions for G8 transport/readout separation.
Keep all route readout-faithfulness classifications UNKNOWN unless source/check evidence supports stronger status.
Use G9 equality-layer intrinsicness to keep physical routes UNKNOWN until external source review; align with R13 and symbol recovery artifacts.
